criterion_1_mfr_snapshot_pair_confirmed.evidence: spec:235-251 (CEProcessFill) and spec:327-345 (CEProcessRecoveredPending). Both actions produce {mfr, snap} atomically, ce_seq' = ce_seq + 2. Proposal collapses to single {mfr}, ce_seq' = ce_seq + 1. Diff hunks match spec exactly.

criterion_2_no_type_discrimination_on_sn.evidence: All 6 Snapshot references in spec are: spec:16 (type set definition), spec:122 (type invariant range), spec:223 (CEProduceDirectEffect exclusion guard), spec:240 (CEProcessFill snap construction), spec:335 (CEProcessRecoveredPending snap construction), spec:774 (Next formula exclusion). Zero instances of any guard or action branching on type = Snapshot or type = MFR. All type-discriminating branches in the spec are on Fill (spec:356, 361) and PendingFill (spec:410, 479, 496, 656, 669) only.

criterion_3_p8_ceffecttypes.evidence: spec:16 confirms MFR is in CEEffectTypes. spec:122 type invariant: ce_log subset of [type: CEEffectTypes, ...]. All produced effects after collapse have type MFR, which is in CEEffectTypes. Snapshot remains as dead member of CEEffectTypes; harmless. spec:909 (INV8) checks e.type in CEEffectTypes union OBEffectTypes union {PendingFill}: MFR satisfies this.

criterion_4_backup_contiguity.evidence: CEBackupApply (spec:254-263) selects by session + next_expected = MaxOfSet(ce_backup_applied)+1. Each fill now produces exactly 1 effect at ce_seq before incrementing by 1. Contiguity is preserved: each produced seq is ce_seq, each increment is +1, no gaps introduced. Identical pattern to CEProduceDirectEffect (spec:220-230). Reviewer backup_contiguity_verified trace (review.json:77) is correct.

reviewer_assessment.quality: Reviewer traced all 6 Snapshot references with spec line citations. Downstream type-agnosticism verified across CEBackupApply, OMSConsumeCE, ArchiverIngestCE, ArchiverIngestCEFromBackup, CEViewChange. All checked properties confirmed SAFE with spec-line evidence. No disputes to adjudicate.

ruling: Proposal is correct. No property is violated by collapsing the MFR+Snapshot pair to a single MFR effect per fill. The Snapshot type carries no semantic weight in the spec: it is never type-discriminated by any consumer, guard, or invariant. The guard simplification from ce_seq+1<=MaxSeq to ce_seq<=MaxSeq is correct and aligns fill actions structurally with CEProduceDirectEffect. Reviewer confidence 0.93 is warranted; judge concurs at 0.96. ACCEPT.

open_items.item: Snapshot remains in CEEffectTypes as a dead type. Removal from CEEffectTypes and from CEProduceDirectEffect exclusion sets (spec:223, spec:774) is a valid follow-up but out of scope for this step.
